summary: P0 IAM Fixes and i18n Testing Complete - All P0 blockers verified and working correctly. Backend tests pass 100%. Frontend UI tests confirm all fixes are implemented.
passed_tests: P0: IAM Page - Specialty dropdown is searchable (search input visible with filtering)
P0: IAM Page - Specialties NOT filtered by team selection (all 257 specialties available)
P0: IAM Page - Media Client account type allows saving WITHOUT selecting any specialties
P0: IAM Page - Media Client specialty label shows NO asterisk (optional field)
P0: IAM Page - 'Optional for Media Clients' message displayed when Media Client selected
P0: IAM Page - Create new user with unique email succeeds (no 'email already registered' error)
P0: IAM Page - Internal Staff without specialty correctly rejected (400 error)
P0: IAM Page - Partner without subscription plan correctly rejected (400 error)
P0: IAM Page - Duplicate email correctly rejected with appropriate error
P0: i18n - Language switcher works (globe icon in header)
P0: i18n - Dashboard shows Spanish translations when Spanish selected
P0: i18n - Sidebar navigation fully translated in Spanish
P0: i18n - All KPI cards translated (Abierto, En Progreso, Pendiente de Revisión, Entregado)
P0: i18n - SLA Status cards translated (A Tiempo, En Riesgo, Vencido, Sin Reconocer)
P0: Identity config API returns all roles and account types correctly
critical_code_review_comments: IAMPage.js line 501-505: getFilteredSpecialties() correctly returns ALL specialties regardless of team
IAMPage.js line 222-228: Frontend specialty validation correctly skips for Media Client
Backend users.py line 294-298: Backend specialty validation correctly skips for Media Client
SearchableSelect component (searchable-select.jsx) provides search functionality with filtering
Translation files (en.json, es.json, pt.json) have 1050+ keys each covering all UI elements
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing are cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 blockers have been verified and are working correctly. IAM page specialty dropdown is searchable, specialties are not filtered by team, Media Client can be created without specialty, and i18n translations are fully working for English, Spanish, and Portuguese.

IAM_Searchable_Specialty.details: Search input visible with placeholder 'Search specialties...', filters results as user types

IAM_Specialty_Not_Filtered_By_Team.details: All 257 specialties available regardless of team selection

IAM_Media_Client_Optional_Specialty.details: Label shows 'Specialties (Select multiple)' without asterisk, 'Optional for Media Clients' message displayed

IAM_New_User_Creation.details: Users with unique emails can be created successfully

i18n_Language_Switcher.details: Globe icon in header, supports English, Spanish (España), Portuguese (Brasil)

i18n_Dashboard_Translations.details: All dashboard elements translated: Panel, Estado de SLA, A Tiempo, En Riesgo, Vencido, Abierto, En Progreso

i18n_Sidebar_Translations.details: All sidebar items translated: Mis Servicios, Crear Nueva Solicitud, Reportar un Problema, etc.

mocked_apis.note: GoHighLevel payment webhook is MOCKED as per previous context
